description.ko: 심해의 영원한 어둠 속에서 생물 발광 생명체들이 네온 빛의 춤을 추며 숨겨진 경이로움을 드러내는 매혹적인 탐험입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking exploration of the deep ocean's hidden wonders, where bioluminescent life forms illuminate the eternal darkness of the abyss in a dance of neon light.

prompt: A cinematic wide-angle shot of the deep ocean abyss, showcasing bioluminescent jellyfish and glowing aquatic flora. Shimmering rays of light pierce through the dark turquoise water, illuminating a mysterious obsidian seabed. High-detail textures, ethereal atmosphere, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, photorealistic underwater ecosystem.
